title: Help adding your digital Veteran Card to the GOV.UK One Login app
body: "How to get your digital HM Armed Forces Veteran Card  Follow the instructions to get a digital version of your HM Armed Forces Veteran Card.  There are a few things you can try if you’re having problems adding your digital Veteran Card to your phone.  Make sure you have the GOV.UK One Login app  Check that you have the GOV.UK One Login app on your phone. If you do not have it you’ll need to download it.  If you’re using a computer or tablet, open the app store on your phone and search for GOV.UK One Login.  If you’re using your phone you can download it from:   the Google Play Store - for Android phones the Apple App Store - for iPhones   Make sure you have the right app. You cannot add your Veteran Card to any other government apps, such as the GOV.UK app or GOV.UK ID Check.  Look for a QR code or button  If you’ve already started adding your Veteran Card, you should have a page open in your web browser with a QR code or button to add your Veteran Card.   Scan the QR code or tap the button to add your Veteran Card.  If you do not have the QR code or button to add your Veteran Card  You need to start the process of adding your Veteran Card again.  Go to Get a digital version of your Veteran Card and follow the instructions.  You may need to sign in and answer some questions again.  If your document could not be added  Try starting the process of adding your Veteran Card again.   Go to Get a digital version of your Veteran Card and follow the instructions.  You may need to sign in and answer some questions again.  If that does not work, contact the Veterans UK Helpline.   Contact GOV.UK One Login if you need more help.  "
